title: Bacterium
description: Bacteria to eat and reform your world.
body:
Recreation of the long lost [Bacteria Mod](http://tennoxmods.blogspot.com/p/bacteria-mod.html) by TeNNoX. 

Genetically engineered bacteria to eat parts of or all of your world. Destroy all the sand in a desert, or just turn it all into grass.

Either way you want to go, be careful with these powerful bacteria colonies.

![Bacteria replacing a large area](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/492/310/172/2020-06-07_15.png)

Start out by crafting some Must,

![Bread surrounding a sponge](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/493/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

Then put it into some water to grow.

![A few Must blocks underwater](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/490/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

A Lot.

![Must blocks filling most of a lake](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/491/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

Once you have enough, compress 9 together and make your colony, either to replace your world,

![4 Compressed Must around a Dispenser](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/495/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

(By placing this block on top of what you want to replace, and then the thing you want it to become on top of that)

or to destroy it.

![4 Compressed Must around a TNT](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/496/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

(By placing all the blocks you want to remove on top of this, and then powering it).

Remember to craft a Jammer just in case.

![5 iron like a minecart, with a Must block on top on one side, Redstone Dust in the center and on the other side](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/296/497/310/172/2020-06-07_16.png)

WARNING: The Bacteria in this mod can break bedrock and duplicate diamonds.

[Bacterium Limits](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bacterium-limits) is a datapack that can be used to add some basic restrictions.
